text:
There once was a young man named Tom who had a talent for making bad decisions.

One day, Tom bought himself a pet goose whose name was Chuck.

Chuck had a taste for trash, and soon Tom's garbage bins were nothing but ruined mealworms.

To fix things, Tom enlisted a wise old owl named Oliver.

Oliver told Tom to throw Chuck outdoors, but Chuck wanted to stay right next to him.

Instead of letting go, Tom held onto Chuck.

Eventually, after a long chase through the forest, they found Chuck's feathers stuck in tree bark.

Chuck had flown away days before, chased off by angry owlhoots.

Now covered in dents, Chuck had to fly south to get those feathers.

Tom was heartbroken.

So he built a little contraption out of old tractor parts.

He glued feathers onto a big branch and flew off into the sunset.

Return!

Chuck the feathered eagle soared across the sky, looking just like Tom's favorite birdie book character.
